ticket.subject: Re: Request for Integration For Shopify store ( KS International)

ticket.description:
Hi Team, 

Please get in touch with Karandeep & help them. 

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn <https://www.linkedin.com/company/Pluginhive>

> On 16 Apr 2026, at 10:47 AM, Karandeep <ksinternational0998@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> Dear Amazon Shipping Team,
> 
> I hope you are doing well.
> 
> We are currently dispatching orders regularly through our Shopify store using the PluginHive app integrated with Amazon Shipping. However, we are facing an issue where the delivery status of previously shipped orders is not being updated in the panel.
> 
> At present, all orders continue to show as "Fulfilled," and the actual delivery status is not being reflected. This is causing difficulty in tracking and managing order completion from our end.
> 
> We would like to highlight that with other shipping platforms, the real-time shipment status (including delivered status) is being fetched correctly. The issue seems to be specific to Amazon Shipping integration.
> 
> We kindly request you to look into this matter and assist us in resolving the issue at the earliest.
> 
> Please let us know if any additional information is required from our side.
> 
> Looking forward to your support.
> 
> 
> 
>

>>

>>

>> Connect with us on LinkedIn <https://www.linkedin.com/company/Pluginhive>

comments.html_body:
Hi Team, 

Please get in touch with Karandeep & help them. 

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

On 16 Apr 2026, at 10:47 AM, Karandeep <ksinternational0998@gmail.com> wrote:

Dear Amazon Shipping Team,

I hope you are doing well.

We are currently dispatching orders regularly through our Shopify store using the PluginHive app integrated with Amazon Shipping. However, we are facing an issue where the delivery status of previously shipped orders is not being updated in the panel.

At present, all orders continue to show as "Fulfilled," and the actual delivery status is not being reflected. This is causing difficulty in tracking and managing order completion from our end.

We would like to highlight that with other shipping platforms, the real-time shipment status (including delivered status) is being fetched correctly. The issue seems to be specific to Amazon Shipping integration.

We kindly request you to look into this matter and assist us in resolving the issue at the earliest.

Please let us know if any additional information is required from our side.

Looking forward to your support.



On Wed, 18 Mar 2026 at 11:48, Abhilash S <abhilash@pluginhive.com> wrote:
Hi Karandeep,

Thanks for joining the call. I hope it was helpful. 

Hi Rahen, 

Integration is completed. 

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

On 18 Mar 2026, at 10:52 AM, Abhilash S <abhilash@pluginhive.com> wrote:

Hi Karandeep,

Let’s connect at 11.15 AM IST.

Please find the meeting invite - https://meet.google.com/byp-pkor-qoe 

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

On 18 Mar 2026, at 10:51 AM, Karandeep <ksinternational0998@gmail.com> wrote:

Hello,

When can we connect for integration ?

On Tue, 17 Mar 2026 at 17:59, Abhilash S <abhilash@pluginhive.com> wrote:
Hi Karandeep, 

Let’s connect tomorrow morning anytime between 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM IST. Please confirm a time that works for you, and I’ll share the meeting invite.

We can also aim to complete the integration tomorrow. You can reach me at +91 9036588031 if needed.

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

On 17 Mar 2026, at 5:49 PM, Karandeep <ksinternational0998@gmail.com> wrote:

Hi Team,
Please let me know when we can connect for integration.

Regards,
Karandeep Singh

On Mon, 16 Mar 2026 at 17:28, M, RAHEN <rahenb@amazon.com> wrote:

Hi @Abhilash S

Please reach out to the shipper for integration for shopify store.

  On 16 Apr 2026, at 10:47 AM, Karandeep <ksinternational0998@gmail.com> wrote: 
   Dear Amazon Shipping Team,  I hope you are doing well.  We are currently dispatching orders regularly through our Shopify store using the PluginHive app integrated with Amazon Shipping. However, we are facing an issue where the delivery status of previously shipped orders is not being updated in the panel.  At present, all orders continue to show as "Fulfilled," and the actual delivery status is not being reflected. This is causing difficulty in tracking and managing order completion from our end.  We would like to highlight that with other shipping platforms, the real-time shipment status (including delivered status) is being fetched correctly. The issue seems to be specific to Amazon Shipping integration.  We kindly request you to look into this matter and assist us in resolving the issue at the earliest.  Please let us know if any additional information is required from our side.  Looking forward to your support.

comments.body:
Talked to customer over phone call. He is on Basic Plan. He is not willing to move to a higher plan as it was shared with him by Amazon that the app is available on $9 plan. He wants to talk to Abhilash about this.
Abhilash is occupied in a meeting. Have informed Abhilash about customer case.

comments.body:
Abhilash talked to the customer.
Customer is willing to move to maximum $19 plan. He needs 400 labels limit per month and live tracking updates.
Abhilash to discuss the requirement further with Vimal and update.
